query:
SELECT a.id, a.workerId, a.weekStartDate, a.confirmedAt IS NOT NULL as is_confirmed,
       a.confirmedAt
FROM availability a
JOIN workers w ON a.workerId = w.id
WHERE (w.name LIKE '%穆伊娜%' OR w.name LIKE '%INA%')
  AND a.weekStartDate >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00'
  AND a.weekStartDate <= '2026-02-09 23:59:59';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2iEKifVQ9gKtEas.9cbf5414b428 --database CMgr35KntT8tLtgpfJPejw --execute
